properties.description: Converted from SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts.dtsx. Lookup result used directly in IfCondition expression — no SetVariable intermediate step.

activities.name: LKP_TodaysData_Flag
activities.description: SSIS Execute SQL Task 1: SELECT flag with result binding to User::TodaysData. Mapped to Lookup (SELECT query).

sqlReaderQuery.value:
select
case when count(*) > 0 then 0 else 1 end as flag
from tbl_SII_Vuln_History_Alerts
where cast(Import_Date as date) = cast(getdate() as date)

activities.name: If_TodaysData_Equals_1
activities.description: SSIS expression constraint: @[User::TodaysData] ==1. Lookup output consumed directly — no SetVariable. TRUE branch: Insert script only. DataFlow and Script are OUTSIDE.

ifTrueActivities.name: ST_Insert_Records_into_Email_Alerts_Tbl
ifTrueActivities.description: SSIS: Insert Records into Email Alerts Tbl. INSERT/SELECT from vw_SII_EmailAlerts_Daily_v2 into tbl_ssis_utility. GO removed (invalid in ADF Script).

text.value:
INSERT INTO [PLHS].[dbo].[tbl_ssis_utility]
(
    [To],
    [Subject],
    [body],
    [ReceiveDate],
    [SendDate],
    [BodyFormat],
    [CC]
)
SELECT 
    [To_],
    [subject_],
    [body],
    GETDATE() AS [ReceiveDate],
    NULL AS [SendDate],
    2 AS [BodyFormat],
    [CC]
FROM [PLHS].[dbo].[vw_SII_EmailAlerts_Daily_v2]
WHERE [To_] IS NOT NULL;

activities.name: DF_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_3
activities.description: SSIS Data Flow Task 'Collect Daily SII Metric'. OUTSIDE IfCondition, runs after it completes.

activities.name: ST_Only_Send_once_a_week
activities.description: SSIS Execute SQL Task 'Only Send once a week'. Multi-statement UPDATE using Calendar table. OUTSIDE IfCondition, runs after DataFlow.

text.value:
declare @upddatedate date = (select
case
when isHoliday = 0
and DATENAME(weekday,getdate()) <> 'Monday' then CurrentDate
else null end as updatedate
from Calendar
where currentdate = cast(getdate() as date)
);
update tbl_ssis_utility
set SendDate = @upddatedate
where SendDate is null

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dataflow_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_3' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_125_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_3') AS Dataflow_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Pipeline_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_3' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_125_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_3') AS Pipeline_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_Container_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_3' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_125_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_3') AS Src_Container_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_filename_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_3' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_125_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_3') AS Src_filename,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_path_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_3' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_125_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_3') AS Src_path_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_Container_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_3' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_125_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_3') AS Tgt_Container_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_filename_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_3' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_125_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_3') AS Tgt_filename,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_path_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_3' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_125_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_3') AS Tgt_path_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Table_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_3' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_125_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_3') AS Tgt_Table_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Schema_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_3' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_125_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_3') AS Tgt_Schema_Name,
